concurrency_guard.reason: Live process scan found other agents already occupying root-event/root-repair/source-regime style run roots; this artifact intentionally avoids duplicate heavy work.

decision: do_not_start_downstream_or_duplicate_heavy_run; wait for active root-panel jobs to finish, then run a materially different Bear/Sideways/Crisis abstain-carry repair panel if no newer row supersedes this selector.
do_not_repeat: SourceRootStopCarryLongHorizonV1 trace/CatBoost readiness replays without user-selected Sideways-compatible historical data

Bear.evidence: 024509 has 8 Bear rows and 024354 has 2 Bear rows; both fail thin/fold-depth/edge gates.
Bear.repair_requirement: Use a Bear-dedicated short/defensive action surface with explicit root alignment and enough chronological folds.

Bull.evidence: 024509 has 6563 selected Bull rows but fails fold, cost, overfit, and score gates; 024354 has 183 Bull rows and no positive edge.
Bull.repair_requirement: Do not add generic Bull rows. Require fold-stable positive net edge after costs and lower PBO/overfit.

Crisis.evidence: 024509 has 424 Crisis rows but insufficient folds plus no positive edge/cost/DSR/specificity failures; 024354 has 0 Crisis rows.
Crisis.repair_requirement: Source older crisis windows or stress-specific provider panels, then score only if Crisis has multi-fold positive edge.

Manipulation(scoped).evidence: Latest 024509 and 024354 have zero direct Manipulation rows, while 205047 passed as a direct stop/take-profit component.
Manipulation(scoped).repair_requirement: Combine 205047 only as scoped component evidence after all price roots pass; do not count component readiness as price-root promotion.

Sideways.evidence: 024509 has 6280 Sideways rows but negative/no positive edge and no specificity; 024354 has 307 rows and still no positive edge.
Sideways.repair_requirement: Use a range-carry or fade surface that abstains in trend contexts and proves positive LCB by fold.

recommended_next_probe.component_policy: Use 205047 ManipulationStopTakeProfitGridV2 as a scoped component only after price roots pass unchanged RC-SPA.
recommended_next_probe.minimum_acceptance_before_downstream: All four price roots pass unchanged RC-SPA and scoped Manipulation remains a component pass; otherwise downstream stays not_started.
recommended_next_probe.name: BearSidewaysCrisisAbstainCarryRepairV1
